speaker: Bruce Feiler
episode_or_content_title: The Secret to Mastering Life's Biggest Transitions
verification_notes:
Created 2026-05-26 via the Six-State Buildout (Phase 8 human-gated promotion). prototype_only reconstruction — paraphrase of the speaker's documented idea; NOT a verified verbatim excerpt. Bruce Feiler is a seven-time NYT bestselling author and TED speaker (2M+ views on this talk). "Life Is in the Transitions" is published by Penguin Press (2020). His research involved 250 life-story interviews across all 50 states, coded for transition patterns. Tier-2 credibility. The TED talk is a real, official talk at ted.com; transcript is linked at the official TED transcript URL. TED transcripts are not reliably WebFetch-able, so this is treated as paraphrase/reconstruction — the core concepts (lifequake, messy middle, long goodbye, nonlinear phases) are verified through the third-party singjupost.com transcript which was fetched and confirmed the key framing. The three-phase model and the nonlinear ordering are central and accurately represented.

[Backfill 2026-06-03] Media fields updated alongside the SIO promotion. Canonical TED slug verified from the existing source_url.
rights_or_usage_notes: Source-link to the canonical official page. Brief paraphrase for attribution; do not reproduce extended passages or re-host media.
